template.p:
Welcome to the Odoo Bakery Package!
The package features the Point of Sale (POS) app for seamless in-store sales and the Sales app for managing orders. For bakeries looking to expand online, the Website and E-commerce apps allow you to showcase products and offer Pick up at Store options.
Ensure your customers can enjoy freshly baked croissants—even on busy sunny Sunday mornings when stock is quickly running low! 🌞

a.class: o_no_link_popover py-1 pe-1 d-block text-reset o_embedded_toc_link o_embedded_toc_link_depth_0
o_no_link_popover py-1 pe-1 d-block text-reset o_embedded_toc_link o_embedded_toc_link_depth_0
o_no_link_popover py-1 pe-1 d-block text-reset o_embedded_toc_link o_embedded_toc_link_depth_0

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o_not_editable lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

div.p: Odoo is entirely integrated into an App. Download it to turn your phone into a tool to manage your entire workflow.

template.p:
By uploading this module's demo data, your database has been filled with a few contacts.
You should be able to execute the following flows to have an overview of various processes you can quickly execute with this package using Odoo.
Of course, this is just an overview of the features included in this package. Feel free to add new apps, delete or modify demo data, and test everything around!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o_not_editable lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-warning pb-0 pt-3

div.p: You didn't import demo data? You can still do it. Go to Apps > Industries > Upgrade your Bakery Package and check the related box.

template.p: Odoo enables complete control over your product catalog and basic stock management, ensuring your inventory data is always accurate.
Start by creating your products within the Products tab, filling in all necessary details. The system uses three distinct categories to provide maximum flexibility across your business:

ul.li: Product Category: For internal tracking and reporting.
E-commerce Category: For easier product retrieval by customers on your online store.
Point of Sale Category: For organizing transactions within your shop system.
Accurately update the inventoried quantity.
Decide whether to allow sales of out-of-stock products.
Define product variants for an improved e-commerce customer journey. Important: Only assign a single value per attribute to prevent the system from creating separate stock entities.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

div.p: The current setup keeps things simple by using basic product counts to track stock. If you need more power, the Inventory app introduces advanced features like barcode scanning, location tracking, and serial number management.
Note: Increased capability leads to higher complexity and more maintenance.

Our Advice: Stick with your current streamlined configuration until you're fully comfortable. When you're ready to upgrade, try the inventory module on a duplicated database first to ensure it fits your workflow. 😉

template.p:
Maintain stock of fresh ingredients.
From the Purchase app:

ul.li: 1. Create a purchase order: Select the materials you need for your breads and pastries.
2. Choose the best vendor: Pick the vendor offering the best deal for the requested materials.

template.p: Odoo’s Point of Sale (POS) system ensures fast and smooth transactions in your bakery.

ul.li: Accept multiple payment options: cash, card, and mobile payments.
Generate printed or digital receipts for customers.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

div.p: These tools allow you to manage your sales strategy and customer interactions effectively:

ol.li: Pricelist Segmentation: Define multiple pricing structures for the same product, supporting different business models (e.g., B2B vs. B2C) and enabling client-specific pricing contracts.
Promotional Agility: Use discounts and promotions to quickly adjust pricing for sales events or to give targeted, manual reductions at the point of sale.
Loyalty Programs: Implement loyalty cards as a core strategy to activate customer retentio and increase customer lifetime value.

template.p: Your e-commerce setup involves three main areas: Product Settings, Website-Wide Settings, and Payment & Delivery Methods.

ul.li: Publishing: Each product can be published independently on your online store.
Product-Level Settings: Define core product settings directly on the product form.
Layout Settings: Adjust the visual presentation and layout of products using the website editor.
Navigate to Website Settings to configure global e-commerce policies.

Crucial Review: You must review all e-commerce settings to ensure they align with your internal business policies (e.g., when invoices are generated, whether a mandatory customer check-in is required for ordering, etc.).

template.p: Use the Website > Configuration menu to enable all your transaction options.

ul.li: Payment Providers & Methods: Go to Website > Configuration > Payment Providers and install all the payment methods and providers you plan to offer (e.g., credit card processors, PayPal, etc.).

Delivery Methods: Go to Website > Configuration > Delivery Methods to define all available options and their costs.
External Providers: Check if a predefined Odoo connection exists if you work with specific shipping carriers.
In-Store Pickup (Click & Collect): If you wish to offer this, you must activate the setting within the Website Settings first.

template.p: Use these settings to tailor the experience for your B2B clients or specific orders:

ul.li: Define B2B Pricing: Create and assign a dedicated pricelist to each B2B contact. Ensure this pricelist is active on your website so the customer sees their agreed-upon prices upon login.
Quote and Confirm: If a specific demand requires pricing, generate a quotation directly from the Sales app. The client can then confirm and sign it online.
Automatic Delivery: Once the quote is accepted, it's possible to deliver the products just as it does for a regular e-commerce order.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

div.p: You have flexibility regarding when to generate invoices:

ul.li: You can choose in the settings to invoice either before or after delivery.
You also have the option to require a down payment initially, with the remainder invoiced later.

template.p: You can easily tailor your website to provide the information you want for potential leads.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

div.p:
Use the
SEO documentation
to improve your website's online visibility and search rankings.

template.h3: Do You Want to Go Further?
template.p: Once your core operations are running smoothly, consider expanding your toolset:

ul.li: Accounting: Automatically log payments, close sessions, and generate tax reports.
Payroll: Use this feature to handle employee salaries and manage holiday requests.
Track stock in real-time, manage multiple storage locations, automate restocking, and monitor expiration dates to ensure ingredient freshness and avoid shortages, with our Inventory app.
Craft your perfect breads, loaves, and pastries with ease, on our Manufacturing app , by creating manufacturing orders based on customer demand and linking the necessary ingredients to each product.
Restaurant Mode: Manage tables, orders, and payments with the Point of Sale system if you offer an "eat-in" option.
Employee Scheduling: Use the Planning App to create and manage employee schedules, ensuring you have the right staff at the right times for busy days and specific orders.

template.p: These all go free in your current subscription; feel free to explore! 🙃

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?
